evidence_direction_note: Re-tagged 2026-04-24T08:10:41Z from weakens to non_contributory (governance walk). Matched-endpoint residue comparison yields matched_gap_intact=-1.639 across all phases (intact/ablated/restored); the sign contradicts the PASS direction and does not respond to ablation (ablated residue collapses to 0 because the gated input is masked, not because nav quality degrades). This is a metric/substrate pathology (hippo paths genuinely accumulate more residue than random on matched endpoints when goals are residue-dense), not disconfirming evidence for either ARC-007 path memory or SD-004 action-object backbone. Route: propose an alternative metric (e.g., success_rate, hazard_encounter_count) that directly tests navigation quality.
